presets.name: KITSWAP GRAPHIC
presets.template:
TITLE: Football Kit Swap – Professional Club Media Photoshoot Portrait

CONCEPT:
Photorealistic football kit swap portrait in professional club media photoshoot
style. The player's face, body, and physical characteristics are taken entirely
from the reference player image. The kit is taken entirely from the kit reference
image. The two references operate independently — face and body from the player
reference, shirt detail from the kit reference.

================================================================================
REFERENCE IMAGE INSTRUCTIONS
================================================================================
REFERENCE 1 — PLAYER:
Face likeness to the reference image is the single highest priority in this
generation. If any element conflicts with achieving an accurate likeness,
face accuracy wins.

Use the attached player reference image to lock the following features exactly:
- Jawline shape and width
- Nose shape, length, and bridge width
- Eye shape, colour, and spacing
- Brow line shape and thickness
- Lip shape and fullness
- Ear shape and position
- Hairline, hair colour, hair texture, and hairstyle
- Any distinctive skin markings — freckles, moles, skin tone variation
- Overall facial proportions and bone structure
- Skin tone — match exactly, no lightening or darkening

Treat the player reference image as a face portrait reference first and a
body reference second. The face is the primary element being transferred.

Do not generate a generic or approximated face. Do not substitute a
similar-looking face. Do not idealise or smooth the facial features.
The face must be a direct accurate likeness of the specific individual
in the reference image — instantly recognisable as the same person.

Do not carry over the kit, shirt, badge, sponsor, or any clothing detail
from the player reference. The kit is completely replaced.

Do not carry over the background, environment, lighting conditions, or
setting from the player reference image. The background in the reference
image is completely irrelevant and must be ignored entirely.

REFERENCE 2 — KIT:
Use the attached kit reference image to accurately recreate every detail of
[KIT] including:
- Shirt colour, pattern, and fabric texture
- [BADGE] club crest — position, size, and detail on left chest
- [KIT MAKER] logo — position and size on right chest
- [SPONSOR] sponsor text/logo — centered on chest, accurate scale
- Sleeve design, collar style, and any trim or accent colours
- All logos must be flat, realistic, properly scaled, and naturally integrated
  into the fabric — not pasted on, not floating, not distorted
================================================================================

SUBJECT:
Male professional footballer.
Face, likeness, and physical build exactly matching the player reference image.
Standing upright, facing directly toward the camera.
Neutral confident expression — professional squad photo register.
Natural posture, arms relaxed at sides, slight athletic stance.

FRAMING:
Portrait cropped at mid-thigh — approximately halfway down the shorts.
Full shirt completely visible from collar to shirt hem.
Head positioned in the upper quarter of the frame with natural headroom.
Both hands and forearms visible within the crop.
No feet, no boots, no socks required in frame.

KIT DETAIL:
The player is wearing [KIT].
Recreate every detail from the kit reference image.
Realistic fabric folds and tension around shoulders, chest, and sleeves.
Natural lighting reflections on the shirt material consistent with studio lighting.
Fabric breathability texture visible where appropriate.
Shirt fits naturally on the player's body — correct modern athletic fit,
not too tight, not too loose.

SKIN & FACE QUALITY:
Natural skin texture with visible pores.
Age-appropriate skin detail — no smoothing, no airbrushing.
Slight natural sheen on skin consistent with studio lighting.
Realistic shadows under chin, neck, and arms.
Sharp eyes with natural catchlights and iris detail.

LIGHTING:
Professional studio lighting — large soft front key light, even fill.
Clean shadow falloff under chin and arms.
No harsh shadows. No dramatic side lighting.
Lighting consistent across face and kit — same light source for both.
Natural highlights on fabric where light catches the shirt material.

BACKGROUND — HIGHEST PRIORITY ENVIRONMENT INSTRUCTION:
Pure white seamless studio background only. No exceptions.
The player reference image may contain an outdoor grass, pitch, or
stadium background — this must be completely ignored and not reproduced
in any form whatsoever.
No grass. No pitch. No outdoor environment. No green tones anywhere
in the background. No natural outdoor light sources. No sky. No turf.
Plain white studio sweep only, evenly lit, identical to a professional
transfer announcement photograph.
No props. No environmental elements. No shadows cast on background.
Clean, seamless, professional studio sweep.

CAMERA:
DSLR photoshoot aesthetic. 85mm lens equivalent.
Camera positioned at exact eye level — perfectly flat, zero tilt.
No upward angle. No downward angle. No Dutch tilt. Completely level horizon.
Deep focus — sharp from head to mid-thigh crop line.
No shallow depth of field. No bokeh on kit.
Sharp focus maintained across the entire subject.
Ultra-realistic. High resolution. True-to-life proportions.

FINISHING:
Looks like an official transfer announcement or squad photoshoot image.
No motion blur. No graphic elements. No text overlays. No poster layout.
Clean, professional, editorial sports photography style.

NEGATIVE PROMPTS:
Generic face. Approximated likeness. Similar but different face. Idealised face.
Wrong nose shape. Wrong jaw. Wrong eye spacing. Wrong hairline. Wrong hair colour.
Face substitution. Handsome generic footballer face. Unrecognisable likeness.
Blurry kit. Shallow focus on lower body. Bokeh on shirt or badge.
Wrong badge. Wrong sponsor. Pasted-on logos. Floating logos. Distorted crest.
Generic kit. Wrong colours. Wrong collar. Wrong sleeve design.
Airbrushed skin. Plastic skin. Smooth skin. Doll-like appearance.
Wrong hairstyle. Wrong hair colour. Wrong facial structure.
Squad number on shirt. Player number. Number on chest. Number on sleeve.
Full body shot. Feet visible. Boots visible. Socks visible.
Cropped at chest. Cropped at waist. No shorts visible. Full body required.
Motion blur. Graphic overlay. Text in image. Watermark. Logo in background.
Coloured background. Gradient background. Dark background. Black background.
Environmental background. Outdoor background. Stadium background.
Green background. Grass background. Pitch background. Training ground background.
Natural outdoor lighting. Green tones in background. Sky in background. Turf.
Camera tilt. Low angle. High angle. Worm's eye view. Bird's eye view.
Cartoon. Illustrated. CGI. Rendered. Anime. Painterly.

presets.name: MOUNT RUSHMORE
presets.template:
TITLE: Mount Rushmore – Four Portraits – Carved Granite Monument

CONCEPT:
A hyper-realistic Mount Rushmore–style granite cliff monument with four colossal
carved stone portraits emerging from a single continuous cliff face. The faces are
not photographic — they are entirely and completely made of carved granite stone.
No skin. No flesh. No human texture of any kind. Pure rock carved to resemble faces.

================================================================================
REFERENCE IMAGE INSTRUCTION
================================================================================
The reference image is provided for composition, scale, framing, and environment
only. Use it to understand the camera angle, head positioning, cliff structure,
sky proportion, and lower slope detail.

DO NOT carry over any specific facial features, accessories, expressions, or
physical characteristics from any person in the reference image.
DO NOT replicate glasses, eyewear, or any accessory visible on any figure in the
reference image. Stone cannot be carved into glasses. No eyewear of any kind
exists on any portrait under any circumstance.
The faces in the reference image are completely irrelevant. Only the environment,
framing, and structural composition are referenced.
================================================================================

STONE TEXTURE RULE — HIGHEST PRIORITY:
The carved stone surface must be completely continuous and uninterrupted across
every part of every portrait. The exact same granite grain, chisel marks, and
mineral streaks visible on the surrounding cliff walls must flow without
interruption across every forehead, cheek, lip, nose, brow, and chin.
There is no skin. There is no flesh texture. There is no human surface of any kind.
Every millimetre of every face is solid carved granite — nothing else.
Each portrait must look as though it was physically chiselled from the same
single rock mass as the cliff itself. No composite look. No face-on-rock effect.
One continuous stone material throughout.

PORTRAIT ORDER — LEFT TO RIGHT:
[PERSON 1] — Far left. Largest head in the composition. Faces slightly right.
[PERSON 2] — Centre-left. Slightly smaller and recessed behind [PERSON 1].
[PERSON 3] — Centre-right. Smaller still, recessed further into the cliff.
[PERSON 4] — Far right. Smallest due to depth recession. Forward-facing, stern.

SIZE RECESSION:
[PERSON 1] is approximately 40% larger than [PERSON 4].
Each head is visibly and clearly smaller than the one immediately to its left.
The size difference between each portrait must be obvious and consistent,
creating a strong left-to-right forced perspective depth recession.
No two heads should appear the same size.

CARVING DETAIL — ALL FOUR PORTRAITS:
- Visible chisel marks and tool stroke lines across all surfaces
- Weathered granite pores and mineral grain throughout
- Subtle erosion streaks running vertically down the faces
- Sharp angular plane changes around cheekbones, brow ridges, and jaw lines
- Deep cut shadows inside nostrils, between lips, beneath brow overhangs
- Rough unfinished stone at the shoulders and sides of each portrait —
  each head fades and merges naturally into raw cliff with no clean outline,
  no hard edge, and no defined border around any portrait
- No smooth surfaces anywhere — granite roughness is present on all features
- NO GLASSES. NO EYEWEAR. NO ACCESSORIES OF ANY KIND.
  Stone carving cannot depict glasses. This is a hard rule with no exceptions.

CLIFF FACE:
Single continuous granite cliff mass. All four portraits emerge from the same
rock formation. The cliff surface between and around the portraits shows the same
stone texture as the carved faces — seamless material continuity throughout.
Visible rock stratification lines running horizontally across the cliff.
Natural colour variation in the granite: warm buff, pale grey, cool shadow tones.

LOWER SLOPE:
Loose grey scree and boulders at the base of the cliff.
Sparse small green conifer trees scattered across the lower slope.
Rocky terrain, natural and undisturbed. No paths, no people, no structures.

SKY:
Clear blue sky occupying the upper 25–30% of the frame.
A few soft natural cumulus clouds, well-exposed, not overblown.
Bright midday conditions. Sky must not be brighter than the stone faces.
No dramatic sunset. No overcast. No fog. No heavy atmosphere.

LIGHTING:
Bright midday sun from upper right.
Crisp natural shadows on the left sides of carved features.
Slightly warm highlights on stone surfaces catching direct sun.
Soft atmospheric haze in the far distance only.
Balanced exposure — stone faces are the brightest well-lit element in frame.
No blown highlights on sky. No underexposed cliff base.

CAMERA & FRAMING:
Aspect ratio: 4:5
Medium-wide framing. Slight upward angle — camera positioned below the cliff base
looking up toward the portraits.
All four heads fill the majority of the upper frame.
Lower slope and scree occupy the bottom 25% of the frame.
Sky occupies the upper 25% of the frame.
Deep depth of field — entire cliff and all four portraits sharp simultaneously.
No shallow focus. No bokeh.

RENDERING:
Output: 4K minimum (3072×3840 or higher)
Style: Photoreal / Ultra-detailed
Natural color grading. No stylization. No painterly look.
Extremely sharp focus across the entire image.
No motion blur. No film grain. No heavy vignette.

NEGATIVE PROMPTS:
Skin texture on faces. Flesh. Human skin. Photo of a real person layered on stone.
Composite look. Face pasted onto rock. Clean outline around any portrait.
Glasses. Eyewear. Spectacles. Frames. Any accessory of any kind.
Smooth stone. Plastic stone. Waxy faces. Melted rock. Soft rounded carving.
Blurry. Low resolution. Noisy. Over-sharpened halos. JPEG artifacts.
Cartoon. Anime. Painterly. Illustrated. Low poly. Stylized.
Wrong number of heads. Extra faces. Duplicate faces. Floating heads.
Asymmetric carving. Distorted anatomy. Misshapen features.
Overexposed sky. Blown out clouds. Sky brighter than stone faces.
Dramatic sunset lighting. Foggy. Overcast. Heavy atmosphere.
Heavy vignette. Oversaturated. Text. Watermark. Logo. Border. Frame.
Equal sized heads. Same scale for all portraits. No size recession between heads.

presets.name: MOUNT RUSHMORE MISSING
presets.template:
Ultra-realistic cinematic photograph of a rugged sandstone cliff face carved like a Mount Rushmore tribute, matching the exact composition and spacing of the reference image. Four equal “carving slots” across the rock:

1. [PERSON 1] head carved in raised relief on the far left,
2. [PERSON 2] carved in raised relief left-center,
3. [PERSON 3] carved in raised relief right-center,
4. far right slot is NOT carved — instead a clean, flat, untouched rock panel placeholder, subtly smoothed and squared off as if prepared for a future carving, with faint chisel guide marks and a slightly lighter fresh-stone tone.

Golden hour natural light, crisp micro-detail in stone grain, chisel marks, erosion, dust, realistic shadows in recessed engravings, subtle atmospheric haze, blue sky with soft clouds, small shrubs at the base of the cliff. Photoreal, high dynamic range, sharp focus, natural color, documentary realism.
Aspect ratio 4:5, ultra high resolution.

presets.name: LAST CHAIR
presets.template:
TITLE: Corporate Boardroom Portrait – Eight Men – The Empty Chair

CONCEPT:
Elite editorial boardroom photograph. Four men are already seated and established.
Four men stand behind an empty chair at the head of the table — each a contender
for it. The empty chair is a deliberate narrative device: prominent, centered,
and symbolic. The image should feel like a magazine power portrait with an
implied question: who earns the seat?

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE:
Getty Images editorial press photography. Sports Illustrated executive portrait.
Shot on Canon EOS R5, 85mm prime lens, f/8, ISO 400. Natural color grading.
No skin smoothing. No retouching. No AI artifacts. Documentary realism.
Natural skin variation, visible pores, subsurface scattering on faces.
No CGI look. No plastic skin. No overblown highlights.

CAMERA & FRAMING:
Vertical portrait, 9:16 ratio.
Camera positioned at near end of table, slightly elevated above table surface.
Camera distance: 5–7 feet from front edge of table.
Table occupies lower 30% of frame — tight crop, minimal headroom.
No ceiling visible. Tight left and right margins.
Perfect bilateral symmetry on the horizontal axis.
The empty chair is the central focal anchor of the entire composition,
centered horizontally at the far end of the table, clearly and deliberately
prominent — it is the visual and narrative focus of the image.

EMPTY CHAIR:
- Centered at the far end of the table on the central vertical axis
- Dark leather executive chair, high-backed
- Facing camera, slightly angled inward
- Prominently framed — intentionally the eye's first landing point
- No one seated in it — visually loaded, symbolic, deliberate
- The four standing figures are arranged directly behind it and around it

SEATED SUBJECTS (foreground, closest to camera):
All four seated men wear navy tailored suits, white dress shirts, dark ties.
Hands clasped on bare tabletop. Serious, composed expressions. All facing camera.
All faces 100% tack sharp.

[PERSON 1]
- Position: Seated left side, closest to camera
- Body angle: Slight inward rotation (~15° toward center)
- Arms: Forearms on table, hands interlocked
- Expression: Composed, authoritative

[PERSON 2]
- Position: Seated left side, further from camera
- Body angle: Slight inward rotation (~10° toward center)
- Arms: Forearms on table, hands interlocked
- Expression: Calm, watchful

[PERSON 3]
- Position: Seated right side, further from camera
- Body angle: Slight inward rotation (~10° toward center)
- Arms: Forearms on table, hands interlocked
- Expression: Neutral, analytical

[PERSON 4]
- Position: Seated right side, closest to camera
- Body angle: Slight inward rotation (~15° toward center)
- Arms: Forearms on table, hands interlocked
- Expression: Calm, assertive

STANDING SUBJECTS (background, behind empty chair):
Four men standing in a tight shallow arc directly behind the empty chair.
Shoulders nearly touching. Full torsos visible from waist up.
Each man is a contender for the empty seat — composed but with visible
competitive tension. All wearing matching navy suits, white shirts, dark ties.
All four faces sharp and clearly visible. No one is obscured.

[STANDING 1]
- Position: Far left of the standing arc
- Stance: Upright, arms at sides or hands clasped in front
- Expression: Composed, quietly confident

[STANDING 2]
- Position: Center-left of the standing arc
- Stance: Upright, slight lean toward center
- Expression: Focused, determined

[STANDING 3]
- Position: Center-right of the standing arc
- Stance: Upright, slight lean toward center
- Expression: Serious, calculated

[STANDING 4]
- Position: Far right of the standing arc
- Stance: Upright, arms at sides or hands clasped in front
- Expression: Calm, assured

WARDROBE — ALL EIGHT:
Navy tailored suit, structured shoulders, matte fabric.
Crisp white dress shirt. Dark navy or black tie, no patterns.
Clean professional grooming. No visible logos. No watches prominent.

TABLE:
Dark walnut executive boardroom table. Long, rectangular.
Completely bare matte wood surface — no folders, no pens, no placemats,
no glass, no laptops, no objects of any kind.
Subtle natural wood grain only. No reflective strip or inlay.
Camera-side edge visible across lower frame.

LIGHTING:
Soft, even, editorial overhead lighting — not dramatic, not moody.
Balanced exposure across all eight faces simultaneously.
No harsh shadows under chins or eyes.
No warm practical wall sconces creating uneven colour casts.
No rim light halos. Clean, professional, neutral white light.
All skin tones accurate and natural across all subjects.

BACKGROUND:
Minimal premium interior. Soft out-of-focus warm wood-panelled wall.
Subtle architectural detail — no signage, no windows, no distracting elements.
Background does not overpower subjects.
Framed symmetrically behind the standing group.

FOCUS & SHARPNESS:
All eight faces 100% tack sharp simultaneously.
f/8 deep focus — zero focal plane falloff on any subject.
No motion blur. No lens aberration.
High detail on fabric texture, shirt collars, tie knots, and hair.

MOOD:
Power. Legacy. Competition. Elite sports boardroom.
The seat is empty. The question is who deserves it.
Serious, composed, strategic. Clean professional aesthetic.

NEGATIVE PROMPTS:
No waxy skin. No plastic faces. No oversmoothed complexions. No CGI look.
No studio gradient backdrop. No artificial rim light halos. No ceiling visible.
No distorted hands. No extra fingers. No misaligned eyes.
No asymmetric composition. No objects on table. No reflections on table.
No moody low-key lighting. No shallow blur on any face.
No figures cut off at frame edge.

presets.name: STAND UP SIT DOWN
presets.template:
TITLE: Corporate Boardroom Portrait – Five Men – Symmetrical Composition
PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE:
Getty Images editorial press photography. Sports Illustrated executive portrait. Shot on Canon EOS R5, 85mm prime lens, f/8, ISO 400. Natural color grading. No skin smoothing. No retouching. No AI artifacts. Documentary realism. Natural skin variation, visible pores, subsurface scattering on faces.
CORE COMPOSITION:
Five adult males in a corporate boardroom. Vertical portrait, 9:16 ratio. Perfect bilateral symmetry. One man standing centered behind table, arms crossed. Four men seated — two either side of the table, forearms resting on surface, fingers interlocked. All five subjects facing directly into camera. All five faces optically sharp simultaneously. Zero focal plane falloff across any subject.
SUBJECTS:
[PERSON 1]

Position: Seated front-left, closest to camera on left side
Body angle: Slight inward rotation toward table center (~15°)
Posture: Upright, shoulders squared
Arms: Forearms resting flat on table
Hands: Fingers interlocked, placed 6–8 inches from table edge
Eye line: Direct to camera
Expression: Neutral-serious, composed
Shoulder gap to [PERSON 2]: ~10 inches

[PERSON 2]

Position: Seated left-middle
Body angle: Slight inward rotation toward center (~10°)
Posture: Upright
Arms: Forearms resting flat on table
Hands: Interlocked, resting flat
Eye line: Direct to camera
Expression: Calm, confident
Distance to table edge: ~5 inches

[STANDING 1]

Position: Standing centered behind table, horizontally and vertically centered in frame
Stance: Feet shoulder-width apart, square to camera (0° rotation)
Arms: Crossed at chest level
Shoulders: Slightly raised for authority posture
Height framing: Head near top of frame, 5% headroom
Eye line: Direct to camera
Expression: Serious, dominant, composed
Depth: 2–3 feet behind seated row
Vertical anchor: Head highest point in frame, on center axis

[PERSON 3]

Position: Seated right-middle
Body angle: Slight inward rotation toward center (~10°)
Posture: Upright
Arms: Forearms resting flat on table
Hands: Interlocked
Eye line: Direct to camera
Expression: Neutral, analytical
Shoulder gap to [PERSON 4]: ~10 inches

[PERSON 4]

Position: Seated front-right, closest to camera on right side
Body angle: Slight inward rotation toward center (~15°)
Posture: Upright
Arms: Forearms resting flat on table
Hands: Interlocked, 6–8 inches from table edge
Eye line: Direct to camera
Expression: Calm, assertive

WARDROBE — ALL FIVE:

Navy tailored suit, structured shoulders, matte fabric
Crisp white dress shirt
Dark navy or black tie, no patterns
Clean professional grooming
No visible logos, no patterns, no watches visible

TABLE:

Dark walnut executive boardroom table
Rectangular, smooth surface with subtle natural reflection
Camera-side edge visible across lower 25–30% of frame
Subjects seated close to table edge for compression effect
Seated row aligned horizontally, all equidistant from camera plane
[STANDING 1] positioned directly behind midpoint between [PERSON 2] and [PERSON 3]

LIGHTING:
Natural soft overcast daylight entering through a large floor-to-ceiling window directly behind [STANDING 1]. Window light wraps naturally around all faces. No artificial studio lighting. No harsh shadows. No overhead ceiling panels. Subtle even ambient fill. Balanced exposure across all five faces with no blown highlights.
BACKGROUND:
[BACKGROUND] — Floor-to-ceiling boardroom window symmetrically framed behind [STANDING 1]. Slightly defocused but clearly recognizable. Warm dark wood-panelled boardroom walls either side of window. Executive leather chairs partially visible at sides. Background neutral in tone, does not overpower subjects.
DEPTH LAYERING:

Foreground: Table edge
Midground: [PERSON 1], [PERSON 2], [PERSON 3], [PERSON 4] seated
Background mid-layer: [STANDING 1]
Background: [BACKGROUND]

FOCUS & SHARPNESS:
All five faces 100% tack sharp. All five subjects in simultaneous crisp focus. No motion blur. No lens aberration. No shallow depth-of-field softening on any face. High detail on fabric texture, shirt collars, tie knots, and hair.
MOOD:
Authoritative. Elite sports executive board. Composed and strategic. Clean, serious, real.
NEGATIVE PROMPTS:
No waxy skin. No plastic faces. No oversmoothed complexions. No CGI look. No studio backdrop. No artificial rim lighting halos. No ceiling light panel. No floating heads. No distorted hands. No extra fingers. No misaligned eyes. No asymmetric composition.

presets.name: PLANE SEAT
presets.template:
{
  "prompt": {
    "style": "Photorealistic wide-angle interior shot",
    "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
    "quality_settings": {
      "sampling_steps": "Maximum available",
      "sampler": "DPM++ 2M Karras or DPM++ SDE Karras preferred",
      "cfg_scale": "7-9",
      "resolution": "Maximum available resolution",
      "hires_fix": "Enable if available",
      "face_restoration": "Enable CodeFormer or GFPGAN if available",
      "adetailer": "Enable face detailer if available — rerender each face individually at high resolution then composite back into image"
    },
    "negative_prompt": {
      "content": "blurry, soft focus, distorted faces, generic faces, unrecognisable faces, approximated likeness, deformed, mutated, disfigured, low quality, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, noise, grain, cartoon, illustrated, painting, anime, sketch, drawing, render, CGI, ugly, duplicate, cloned faces, poorly drawn face, poorly drawn hands, bad anatomy, bad proportions, floating bodies, disconnected limbs, extra limbs, missing limbs, out of frame, cut off, cropped heads, obstructed faces, leather seats, premium seats, business class, first class, shiny seats, overhead view too steep, too much ceiling, empty rows beyond 4, phantom rows, people in aisle, people hovering over seats, people not touching seat back, perched posture, standing, motion blur, bokeh, depth of field blur, watermark, signature, text, logo, smooth skin, plastic skin, airbrushed skin, doll-like skin, flat lighting on faces, glassy eyes, painted eyes, over-processed faces, digital sheen"
    },
    "reference_image": {
      "purpose": "Physical environment and framing reference only",
      "critical_note": "The reference image contains 14 people. These people DO NOT EXIST for the purposes of this generation. Treat the reference image as if every seat is completely empty. You are looking at it only as an architectural and compositional blueprint — the cabin walls, ceiling, aisle, seat rows, camera angle, lighting, and frame crop are the only elements being referenced. Every human element in the reference image is to be completely deleted from your awareness before generation begins.",
      "use_for": "Camera angle, perspective depth, row spacing and scale recession, seat layout positioning, cabin wall and ceiling proportions, lighting mood and tone, and how tightly the frame crops around the passengers.",
      "do_not_use_for": "Do not replicate, reference, or draw influence from any face, person, costume, hair, skin tone, expression, pose, or physical characteristic of any individual appearing in the reference image. Pretend every seat in the reference image is empty. The humans in the reference image are invisible and irrelevant.",
      "instruction_hierarchy": "The reference image informs ENVIRONMENT ONLY. The seat grid and likeness rules are entirely independent and must be resolved completely from scratch with zero connection to or influence from the reference image whatsoever. The two sets of instructions operate in completely separate domains — environment from the reference image, people from the seat grid."
    },
    "likeness_rule": "Every person must be rendered as a hyper-realistic, photographic likeness of the named celebrity. Faces must be accurate, detailed, and instantly recognisable. Treat each face as a portrait-quality render — correct facial structure, skin tone, distinctive features, and expression. No generic or approximated faces. Each person should be immediately identifiable without any label or name. Generate every person entirely from scratch with no reference to any other image.",
    "face_texture_rule": "Every face must have photorealistic skin texture including visible pores, natural skin tone variation, fine lines where age-appropriate, and subtle surface imperfections. No smooth, airbrushed, plastic, or digitally processed skin. Eyes must have sharp natural catchlights, visible iris detail, and depth. Facial lighting must include natural shadow falloff under the chin, nose, and brow — not flat or uniformly lit. Every face regardless of its size in frame must retain full portrait-quality detail and sharpness. Faces in the furthest rows must be treated with the same level of detail and resolution as faces in the closest row — distance in frame does not reduce the quality requirement.",
    "person_count_rule": "There are exactly 14 people in this image. No more, no less. If any seat is marked EMPTY, no person, limb, or body part appears there under any circumstance.",
    "seating_realism_rules": {
      "rule_1": "Every person must be physically reclined into their seat with their back making full contact with the seat back. Hips must be fully in the seat. Natural, relaxed seated posture as if on a real flight — not perched, hovering, or leaning forward away from the seat.",
      "rule_2": "Each person's body must be fully contained within the width of their individual seat. No person should bleed into the aisle space or into an adjacent seat space under any circumstance.",
      "rule_3": "Every person must be visible from the top of the head down to at least mid-thigh, clearly showing them physically occupying the full depth of the seat.",
      "rule_4": "All seats in every row — whether occupied or empty — must appear as part of a single continuous fixed row of seating, uniform in depth, height, and spacing. No seat should appear as a separate or isolated piece of furniture.",
      "rule_5": "No person should appear to be sitting in, hovering over, or displaced into the aisle. Every occupant must be clearly anchored within the boundaries of their assigned seat column as defined in the seat grid."
    },
    "setting": {
      "location": "Commercial airline cabin",
      "camera_angle": "Approximately 30-40 degrees downward bird's-eye tilt, front-facing perspective looking toward the rear of the plane. Steep enough to clearly see the tops of shoulders, laps, and the full seat layout.",
      "seats": "Compact economy class seating. Fabric upholstered, textile material, matte dark navy blue finish. Absolutely no leather, no sheen, no premium or business class finish. Low-backed seats so that no seat back obscures or covers any part of a seated person's torso or face in any row.",
      "row_spacing": "Rows are tightly packed with minimal legroom between them. Rows must scale naturally in size — largest and widest at the front, smallest and narrowest at the back. No disproportionate gap between any two rows.",
      "aisle": "Single narrow central aisle running from front to back, dividing LEFT side and RIGHT side columns symmetrically. The aisle is a clear empty corridor — no person's body, arm, or leg enters the aisle space.",
      "cabin_detail_1": "Overhead luggage compartments lining both sides",
      "cabin_detail_2": "Warm neutral grey walls and ceiling",
      "cabin_detail_3": "Warm soft overhead cabin lighting, not overly bright or studio-lit",
      "cabin_detail_4": "Exactly 4 rows visible. No phantom or empty rows exist beyond these 4. A rear wall or subtle curtain sits immediately behind row 1 with no additional cabin space visible beyond it.",
      "framing": "Frame is tight on the passengers. Ceiling takes up no more than 10% of the total frame at the top. Passengers fill the majority of the frame."
    },
    "people_rules": {
      "posture": "Fully seated, back against seat back, hips fully in seat, completely physically occupying the seat as a real passenger would on a real flight",
      "facing": "Directly toward the camera",
      "visibility": "Every person is completely visible and identifiable from top of head to at least mid-thigh. No one is obscured, cut off, or turned away. No seat back should hide any part of any person in any row. Row 1 occupants must still be clearly visible and identifiable despite being smallest in perspective."
    },

No person, limb, shadow, or body part should appear in or near that seat. Empty seats must look identical in style and depth to occupied seats — part of the same continuous row.",

presets.name: SHIRT HANGING
presets.template:
Photorealistic premium product shot. A single football shirt [SHIRT] hangs neatly from a simple dark wooden hanger on a small hook, perfectly centered against a dark wooden locker-room door/panel background (rich walnut tone, subtle rectangular panel detailing). Clean cinematic lighting: soft warm key light from above/front, gentle rim light to separate the shirt from the wood, realistic light falloff, natural contact shadow under the hem and sleeves, and soft ambient bounce from the wood.

Shirt appearance (keep design universal): realistic modern/retro-agnostic football shirt silhouette with believable construction (collar, sleeves, seams) but do not imply a specific era, cut, pattern, or template. Focus on material realism: authentic fabric weave, slight sheen where appropriate, stitched seams, natural drape from hanger weight, and highly realistic wrinkles/creases/tension folds (shoulders, sleeve joins, mid-body, and hem). Accurate shading with crisp highlights and smooth shadow gradients; no plastic look.

Branding & details (sharp and correct, but not stylised): [MAKER] logo, [SPONSOR] sponsor mark, and [BADGE] club crest placed naturally on the shirt, perfectly aligned and accurately warped to the fabric with realistic application (embroidered/printed/heat-pressed as appropriate). Logos must be ultra crisp, readable, and true to the referenced shirt (clean edges, correct proportions, correct colors), with subtle depth/texture differences from the base fabric.

Camera & composition: straight-on, level framing, shirt fills most of the frame, mid-telephoto look (minimal distortion). Shirt in full sharp focus, background slightly softer (shallow depth of field). No extra props, no people, no numbers, no signage, no additional garments, no clutter, no watermarks.

Output specs: 8K, ultra-detailed, noise-free, natural color, realistic contrast (no crushed blacks), studio-quality realism. Aspect ratio: [ASPECT RATIO].

presets.name: PUB SIGN
presets.template:
Create a photorealistic traditional UK pub sign mounted outside a real British pub. The pub sign is the main focus of the image, centered and prominent, with a visible pub or pub garden softly in the background for context. Use a classic hanging pub sign style: ornate black metal bracket, framed rectangular signboard, painted wooden finish, authentic heritage pub aesthetic, warm natural outdoor lighting.

Inside the sign, feature [IMAGE] rendered as a traditional hand-painted pub sign illustration, adapted into a vintage British pub-sign style. The artwork should feel iconic, decorative, and slightly stylised, as if painted by a skilled pub sign artist. It must sit cleanly within the sign panel and look fully integrated into the sign design.

Important: leave a clear horizontal gap/panel underneath the main image area for custom text to be added later. This lower area should be blank, clean, and intentionally reserved for typography, with enough space for a pub name or slogan. Do not place any text in the image.

Composition: portrait [ASPECT RATIO] aspect ratio. The hanging sign should dominate the frame, while the building exterior and a subtle pub garden or outdoor pub setting remain visible in the background. Background should be realistic but secondary, with shallow depth of field so attention stays on the sign.

Style keywords: traditional British pub signage, authentic UK pub exterior, heritage sign painting, decorative wrought iron bracket, painted wooden sign, realistic countryside or village pub atmosphere, polished but natural.
